meta.method_name: Label-free decoy-competition (knockoff+) FDR gate for LLM text->logic fact admission, with auditable trace-graphs
meta.anchor: 24-doc application anchor (8 legal CUAD-crisp / 8 news Wikinews-silver / 8 regulatory GDPR+eCFR-silver)
meta.headline_finding: Decoy-gating reduces the hallucinated-fact rate vs raw LLM in 0 of the grid cells with CI separation; the largest CI-separated reduction is at regulatory/portable/alpha=0.5: raw=0.439 -> gate=0.360 (abs 0.079).

weight_map.alpha_hat_source: decoy_fdr_hat of the operative (genre, portable, alpha=0.5) gate cell

meta.prob_note: deterministic backward-chaining remains the baseline; NO headline number depends on ProbLog. Multi-hop probabilistic marginals are demonstrated on regulatory (real cross_references+grants_right bridges); legal/news show single-fact probabilistic admissions (marginal = the leaf's calibrated unification weight).

party_bound_effective(A,P,D) :- has_party(A,P), effective_date(A,D).
titled_dated(A,T,D) :- has_title(A,T), agreement_date(A,D).
query(party_bound_effective('Premium Managed Hosting Agreement','AstroNutrition.com','March 1, 2005')).
query(party_bound_effective('Premium Managed Hosting Agreement','deep systems','March 1, 2005')).

prob_trace_graphs.program:
0.490196::has_title('Art. 13 GDPR','Information to be provided where personal data are collected from the data subject').
0.294118::cross_references('Article 13 GDPR','the obligation to provide information when personal data are collected from the data subject').
0.009804::cross_references('controller','reference to the appropriate or suitable safeguards and the means by which to obtain a copy of them').
0.107843::cross_references('controller','the existence of automated decision-making, including profiling').
0.029412::cross_references('controller','the existence or absence of an adequacy decision by the Commission').
0.147059::cross_references('controller','the fact that the controller intends to transfer personal data to a third country or international organisation').
0.421569::cross_references('controller','the purposes of the processing for which the personal data are intended as well as the legal basis for the processing').
0.156863::cross_references('controller','the right to withdraw consent at any time').
0.098039::cross_references('controller','whether the provision of personal data is a statutory or contractual requirement').
0.372549::has_exception('controller','where and insofar as the data subject already has the information').
0.352941::obligates('controller','provide all of the following information at the time when personal data are obtained').
0.215686::obligates('controller','to provide the data subject with additional information necessary to ensure fair and transparent processing').
0.343137::grants_right('data subject','to request from the controller access to and rectification or erasure of personal data or restriction of processing concerning the data subject or to object to processing as well as the right to data portability').
relevant_right(A,R) :- cross_references(A,B), grants_right(B,R).
obligation_with_exception(A,O,E) :- obligates(A,O), has_exception(A,E).
titled_obligation(A,T,O) :- has_title(A,T), obligates(A,O).
query(obligation_with_exception('controller','provide all of the following information at the time when personal data are obtained','where and insofar as the data subject already has the information')).
query(obligation_with_exception('controller','to provide the data subject with additional information necessary to ensure fair and transparent processing','where and insofar as the data subject already has the information')).

atomic_reduction_pooled.note: Pooled atomic hallucinated-fact reduction is DIRECTIONAL, not CI-separated at n=24: 0/40 grid cells and 0/10 pooled cells have a raw-gate difference CI excluding 0. Reported as a ~25% relative-reduction trend with auditable provenance, NOT a significant reduction.

multihop_corruption.origin_note: The pooled multi-hop corruption drop (0.5238095238095238 -> 0.25) is ENTIRELY regulatory-driven: legal derives clean conclusions (corrupt=0) and news derives none (derived=0). With one contributing genre and only 21->8 conclusions the CI is WIDE; this is a DIRECTIONAL trend, not a significant reduction.

clutrr_contrast.note: decoy_fdr_hat >= realized in ALL cells here (the gate over-estimates falsity / under-admits => CONSERVATIVE), the OPPOSITE of the CLUTRR multi_hop anti-conservative regime where decoy_fdr_hat=0.5 < realized=1.0.

self_report_analysis.interpretation: A conservative self-report means the certificate is an UPPER bound on the realized error here: the operator can trust decoy_fdr_hat as a safe (if loose) ceiling on admitted-fact falsity.

F1.caption: F1. Pooled (all-genre) atomic hallucinated-fact rate, RAW LLM vs decoy-competition gate, across alpha for both elicitations (logprob, portable). Error bars = document-block (cluster) bootstrap 95% CI (B=2000), n=24 docs. 0/40 grid cells are CI-separated => the ~25% relative reduction at alpha=0.5 (raw~0.245 -> gate~0.18) is a DIRECTIONAL trend, NOT significant at n=24. The 1/k admission floor is {20,10,5,4,2} for alpha {.05,.10,.20,.30,.50}.

F2.caption: F2. Multi-hop corrupted-conclusion rate, RAW-KB vs GATE-KB (alpha=0.5), with document-block bootstrap 95% CIs (B=2000). Per-genre derived-conclusion counts show the drop (0.52381 -> 0.25) is ENTIRELY regulatory-driven: legal derives clean conclusions (corrupt=0), news derives none. With one contributing genre and 21->8 conclusions the CI is WIDE; the reduction is DIRECTIONAL, not significant.

F3.caption: F3. Self-report calibration: the gate's own decoy_fdr_hat (x) vs the realized FDR against gold (y), all 40 (genre x elicitation x alpha) cells. ALL points lie on/above the y=x line (anti_conservative_cells=0) => CONSERVATIVE self-report (decoy_fdr_hat >= realized). Contrast: the CLUTRR multi_hop point (0.5, 1.0) sits BELOW y=x (anti-conservative) — opposite regimes on different anchors.

conclusion: present consent request in a clearly distinguishable manner

F4.caption: F4. Probabilistic trace-graph for a regulatory multi-hop conclusion (titled_obligation), engine=problog. Node labels carry the ProbLog/WMC marginal (derived nodes) or the gate-consistent shrinkage weight w_i=(1-alpha_hat)*calibrate(Z_i) (leaf nodes); every leaf retains its provenance + decoy (W_i,T,alpha) + entrapment (FDP_hat,r) certificate. Deterministic backward-chaining remains the baseline; the marginal is an added probabilistic annotation.
